description_long: This is a compact street food cart with a rectangular red base mounted on two large black wheels and a supporting leg. The cart features a flat serving counter with several round plates or buns and condiment bottles, all sheltered by a pitched roof with a dark blue and white polka-dot pattern. The front of the cart displays a sign with a stylized hamburger graphic, suggesting it serves burgers or similar fast food. A handle extends from one side, allowing the cart to be pushed or pulled. The structure is primarily constructed from wood and metal, with plastic bottles and food items on the counter. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for urban sidewalks or parks.
description: A small red food cart with a polka-dot roof, serving counter, condiment bottles, and a hamburger sign, mounted on wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hamburger sign, serving counter with plates and bottles, and the pitched roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wheels, handle, condiment bottles, and the full length of the serving counter.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cart, the counter setup, and the supporting leg.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the handle, wheels, and arrangement of food items and bottles.
attribute_signage: A sign with a stylized hamburger graphic on the front panel.
